desc: Mine agent execution metrics, brief effectiveness, roadmap persistence gap. Quantify token/latency savings + identify drift between prospective and committed DAGs.

init.desc: Establish mining baseline: gather transcripts, logs, agent execution records

analyze-agent-metrics.desc: Extract latency, token count, tool calls from agent execution logs (produces: mining-agent-metrics.json)

analyze-brief-effectiveness.desc: Compare briefed agents vs full-context agents: execution time, token efficiency, tool precision (produces: mining-brief-effectiveness.json)

mine-roadmap-persistence.desc: Scan transcripts for 'orient-then-forget' pattern: prospective DAG edits not committed to head.json (produces: mining-persistence-gap.json)

quantify-impact.desc: Impact analysis: token savings from briefs, latency reduction, persistence gap frequency/cost (produces: mining-impact-summary.json)

enforce-roadmap-sync.desc: Design enforcement pattern: detect head.json divergence, prevent context-clear drift, recommend git hooks (produces: enforcement-roadmap-sync.md)

synthesis.desc: Final synthesis: metrics report, brief ROI, persistence enforcement recommendations (produces: mining-synthesis-report.json)

term.desc: Mining complete: latency metrics analyzed, brief effectiveness measured, persistence gap quantified
